name: [Margin Preset] Apply to Rental Cars
description: Reads margin_presets and applies margin_selected/remaining per locale to all batch_rental_car items based on their destination, then recalculates sell_price.

options.confirmationDescription: Apply margin presets to all rental cars and recalculate sell prices?

name: [Margin Preset] Apply to Tours
description: Reads margin_presets and applies margin_selected/remaining per locale to all batch_tours items based on their destination, then recalculates sell_price.

options.confirmationDescription: Apply margin presets to all tours and recalculate sell prices?

name: [Margin Preset] Apply to Round Trips

options.confirmationDescription: Apply margin presets to all round trips and recalculate sell prices?

name: [Init] Default Margins - Batch Rental Car
description: On item creation, auto-creates translation records with margin=0 and sell_price=buy_price for any locales not already set.

name: [Init] Default Margins - Batch Hotel
description: On item creation, auto-creates translation records with margin=0 and sell_price=buy_price for any locales not already set.

name: [Init] Default Margins - Batch Tours
description: On item creation, auto-creates translation records with margin=0 and sell_price=buy_price for any locales not already set.

name: [Batch] Calculate Sell Prices - Round Trip
description: Calculates sell_price per locale for a batch_round_trip item: sell_price = buy_price * (1 + margin/100)

options.confirmationDescription: Recalculate sell prices for all locales?

description: On item creation, auto-creates translation records with margin=0 and sell_price=buy_price for any locales not already set.

name: [Margin Preset] Apply to ALL Products
description: Master batch flow: reads margin_presets and applies margin_selected/remaining per locale to ALL batch products (hotels, campers, rental cars, round trips, tours) based on their destination, then recalculates sell_price for each.

options.confirmationDescription: Apply margin presets to ALL products (hotels, campers, rental cars, round trips, tours) and recalculate all sell prices?.
